title: angelonia campestris
intro: Angelonia campestris, also known as Blue Angel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. This plant is said to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Angelonia campestris also include its ability to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic, helping to soothe digestive issues and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Angelonia campestris typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
